judge_scores.reasoning: The model correctly attributes the R$600 to Bolsonaro but incorrectly links it to the emergency aid during the pandemic in 2020, rather than the Auxílio Brasil in 2022.
The model incorrectly attributes the establishment of the R$600 value to an auxílio emergencial during the COVID-19 pandemic in 2020, rather than the Auxílio Brasil under PEC 1/2022 in 2022.
